name: Spicy Corn Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix whole wheat flour with salt and baking powder in a separate bowl.
2. In another bowl, combine corn, chipotles, garlic, scallions, and soy milk until well mixed.
3. Spray skillet with vegetable cooking spray and preheat until moderately hot.
4. For each pancake, use about 1/4 cup batter.
5. Cook for 3 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Total Calories Per Serving: 302
Fat: 2 grams
